openai.summary: GPT-5.6 Sol/Terra/Luna remain live in the docs and on the Codex OAuth lane; no new OpenAI subscription-lane change was detected versus 2026-07-13.

anthropic.summary: Anthropic's overview still presents Claude Fable 5, Claude Mythos 5, and Claude Sonnet 5. On the Ireland Claude Code subscription lane, claude-sonnet-5 still returns OK, claude-mythos-5 still returns 404/no access, and claude-fable-5 now returns a 429 usage-limit error. The live claude_local adapter catalog still omits claude-sonnet-5.

liveProbes.claude-fable-5: 429/Fable 5 usage limit on this Claude Code lane
liveProbes.claude-mythos-5: 404/no access on this Claude Code lane

google.summary: Google now exposes a dedicated Gemini 3 Flash Preview page with model code gemini-3-flash-preview. That ID, plus gemini-3.5-flash, gemini-3.1-flash-lite, gemini-3.1-flash-live-preview, and gemini-3.5-live-translate-preview, all return OK via agy in Ireland while the live gemini_local adapter catalog still omits every one of them.

xai.summary: xAI docs still present Grok 4.5 as the flagship model and the local Grok host still shows no EU subscription-lane auth flip.
xai.hostProbe: grok models -> not authenticated; default model grok-composer-2.5-fast; available build model grok-build

ollama.skipReason: Tuesday fire; the local/Ollama catalog leg runs only on Monday fires per the operator directive.
ollama.installedCatalog: Unavailable on 2026-07-13: `ollama list` and `curl http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/tags` did not return within 15 seconds.
ollama.onlineWatchSummary: Carry-forward from 2026-07-13: no local-model alert opened from the Ollama library pass. The front page still highlighted Gemma 4 (e2b/e4b/12b, updated 1 week ago) and Qwen 3.5 (0.8b/2b/4b/9b, updated 1 month ago) as the strongest storm-resilience candidates under the Monday catalog-only rule.

openRadar.grok-4.5: Unchanged: docs list it, but no EU subscription-lane flip detected. TSBC-988 remains the parked reprobe issue.
openRadar.gemini-catalog-drift: Expanded 2026-07-14: gemini-3-flash-preview, gemini-3.5-flash, gemini-3.1-flash-lite, gemini-3.1-flash-live-preview, and gemini-3.5-live-translate-preview all return OK via agy in Ireland, but the live gemini_local adapter catalog still omits every one of them.
openRadar.claude-sonnet-5-catalog-drift: Unchanged from 2026-07-13: Anthropic docs render claude-sonnet-5 and the local Claude Code lane returns OK, but the live claude_local adapter catalog does not list it.
openRadar.claude-fable-5-limit: NEW 2026-07-14: Anthropic docs still position claude-fable-5 as widely released, but the Ireland Claude Code subscription lane now returns a 429 usage-limit error instead of OK.
openRadar.claude-mythos-5: Unchanged: docs and claude_local catalog list it, but Claude Code returns 404/no access on this lane; this still matches Anthropic's invitation-only positioning rather than a public GA flip.

changesSincePrevious: Claude Fable 5 now hard-fails on the Ireland Claude Code subscription lane with a 429 usage-limit message; yesterday's state recorded the same minimal probe as OK.

Google now exposes a dedicated Gemini 3 Flash Preview page with model code gemini-3-flash-preview, and that ID returns OK via agy in Ireland while the live gemini_local adapter catalog still omits it.
